title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese extracts four rules from Anthropic engineers' actual Claude Code prompting practices: prompt for skills not the model itself, build skills as composable reusable units, save scripts inside skills, and allow skills to improve across sessions. The video positions these as commonly misunderstood patterns applicable to any project.
